description.value:
Your ancestors once lived underground, hiding away from the light. Now you take that instinct to its astral extreme, seeking the dark sides of moons, the deepest craters, and the blackest nebulae, places where the noise and light of society can't get in. While some void hermits merely seek solitude to consider heady problems in peace, others pursue the twisted, eldritch knowledge of malicious fey and outer gods to the deepest, darkest corners of the galaxy. Only you know what you hope to find there in the dark.

You learn the Aklo language and become trained in Occultism. If you would automatically become trained in Occultism (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. Additionally, you gain the cosmic trait.
